entry.title: Time to do it all over again, but now with you at my side
entry.summary:
Author: riddleManager

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,531Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 169

Summary: HEAVY SPOILERS FOR THE ENTIRE SHOWMerlin can't believe that Arthur is actually dying, if only he could do it all over and do everything different.If onlyWil contain Merthur but am planning on making it slowburn, focus is not entirely on romance will focus on Merlin trying to do better this time

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,523Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 50

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: sword_and_shield_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,251Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Arthur is the Detective Chief Inspector of the CaPD (Camelot Police Department). Merlin works there as a forensic scientist. Although they're attracted to each other, their relationship is nothing more than physical relief and, most importantly for Arthur, secret.Together they solve cases involving magic, even though Merlin hasn't shared his most important secret with Arthur yet. For good reason. After all, sorcerers are despised in the eyes of the Pendragons. Will they eventually acknowledge their feelings for each other and admit them? Until then, they have a bumpy, painful, and eye-opening road ahead.

entry.title: You should Never have let me Believe
entry.summary:
Author: Heyup_bro

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,602Chapters: 2/22Kudos: 13

Summary: PLEASE READ THE TAGS!! I will make sure to put warnings on each chapter so you can try skip the violence but please still beware. ✧*̣̩⋆̩☽⋆༉‧₊˚✧ When the round table crew get captured by a vengeful noble while on a hunt, things quickly turn sour with their captors and Merlin is forced to choose between revealing his magic and saving them all. Obviously, that is an incredibly easy dilemma. All that’s left is to try clean up the mess he ends up creating and get them out, while convincing those fearful of magic that he means no harm. Easy, right? ✧*̣̩⋆̩☽⋆༉‧₊˚✧ This is my first fic so I hope you guys like it!!I may add tags as it goes on so please keep an eye on them Based off of Tansyuduri’s fic ‘Return To Me’

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,673Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 81

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Through All of Time
entry.summary:
Author: Sorreli

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,780Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 32

Summary: “I believe it,” Arthur sighs, “I won’t ever get a break, will I? How is it I’ve managed to become the sole entertainment for two sorcerers? I mean, really.”  Merlin chuckles, “I think his magic just… recognizes you.”  Merlin can hear Arthur's breath stutter behind him. “Oh, that’s…”  “I know,” he agrees, turning in Arthur’s arms so he can finally see his face. In the moonlight Arthur appears quite taken, the sudden pull of emotion heavy in the blue of his eyes as he stares back at Merlin unblinking. “I keep thinking about what my mother said. How she thinks his magic is just acting out because he doesn’t know what it’s like to be afraid of showing it. How he feels safe. With you.”  Arthur’s jaw tightens and finally he does look away, something glistening in his eyes as he loosens his hold on Merlin’s waist.  “With you too,” he mumbles, blinking just a little too quickly, “...maybe we are doing something right.”    -   A series of one shots that take place in the rise of Albion where Merlin and Arthur raise a child together through the years.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_p3ndragon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,514Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 234

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: Two Hearts, Bound by Fate
entry.summary:
Author: Encantus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,067Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Merlin Emerson, a hybrid Labrador/Wolf Therian (or Shifter) leaves his small town in Texas and travels to New Haven, Connecticut to attend Wildwood Academy, one of the most prestigious colleges for Shifters in America. While there he quickly realizes that his destiny is about to catch up with him when he bumps into his mate, purely by accident. He's arrogant, rude, and rich, the exact opposite of Merlin. Oh, and he's a Cat. Merlin will find a depth in Arthur that he isn't expecting, but also something more: a home. Somewhere he truly belongs, where he can be himself. Is this what he was looking for all along? Is this going to last? He certainly hopes it's not some cruel joke of fate.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,263Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 69

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury.Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own .Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other.There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet.But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it.---------------------------A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed) Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: Among The Wildflowers
entry.summary:
Author: YellingAtPlants

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,791Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 127

Summary: Part three of the Where the Quiet Things Grow saga·༻𐫱༺·Post Not All Dragons and Dandelions, a direct continuation of Beneath the Roses (though can be read without reading either)·༻𐫱༺· After a disastrous confrontation with his father, Arthur Pendragon finds himself on the run with his soulmate. He learns that really, he knew absolutely nothing before Merlin came into his life, everyone he thought were his enemies are friends, his friends are all cruel people (one more princess joke Gwaine... see what happens) and his sister is a meddling witch. No, really. Oh, and apparently his soulmate is a god. ·༻𐫱༺· A story of subterfuge, humour, falling in love, overthrowing a tyrant king and cheese that tastes like apple pies... or something like that.

  • Mild Hurt/Comfort

entry.title: Love Snatched from the Veil
entry.summary:
Author: AstridMagic

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,208Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 11

Summary: "For all your magic Merlin you can't save my life." Merlin finds the power within himself to help heal Arthur at Avalon and he and Arthur are gifted with a second chance to restore magic to Albion together and bring about an age of prosperity and peace. On the journey back to Camelot Arthur and Merlin grow ever closer and Merlin has the time to share everything that he has gone through with Arthur. Back in Camelot Arthur and Merlin wrestle with whether revealing Merlin's identity as Emrys to the rest of the knights and people will aid in the acceptance of magic again. Meanwhile, just before the battle of Camlann, Lancelot returned from the veil (for real this time) and Gwen is torn between her loyalty to Arthur and her true feelings for Lancelot, while suspecting that in his heart Arthur has always yearned for somebody else.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Gwen/Lancelot (Merlin)

entry.summary:
Author: RomaMarufixx

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,508Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Merlin's kingdom is falling, after her father's death her kingdom needs a king and King Uther makes her an offer she must accept. Fem!Merlin/Arthur, Royal!Merlin. Originally posted on FF.net in 2012/2013.

Summary: Merlin hides under Arthur’s bed, and is shocked when Arthur puts on a shirt to sleep.

entry.title: Criminal
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,654Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: Four months later, Merlin was waiting for the same prat who had broken up with him—if Arthur even thought they were in a relationship and not just convenient shags… well, Merlin had thought they were. But he couldn’t exactly text and ask for clarification anymore, could he? So he got to decide what it had been. He didn’t even have a plan. Yell? Cry? Punch that ridiculous jawline and then immediately apologise because it was probably insured for millions?

  • Underage Sex
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • Football | Soccer Player Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Student Merlin (Merlin)

  • Age Difference

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,638Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 254

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
